metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan Cassandra for new keyspaces and tables

elements.label: Contact Points
elements.tooltip: Comma-separated list of Cassandra hosts (contact points)
elements.errMsg: At least one contact point is required

elements.label: Native Transport Port
elements.tooltip: Cassandra native protocol port (default 9042)

elements.label: Local Datacenter
elements.tooltip: Name of the local datacenter for DC-aware load balancing (e.g. datacenter1). Leave blank to auto-detect from system.local.

elements.label: Fallback Datacenters
elements.tooltip: Comma-separated fallback datacenters. When set, LOCAL_ consistency levels are relaxed (LOCAL_ONE→ONE, LOCAL_QUORUM→QUORUM) so the driver can route to remote DCs when the local DC is unavailable.

elements.label: Username
elements.tooltip: Cassandra username (leave empty if authentication is disabled)

elements.label: Password
elements.tooltip: Cassandra password (leave empty if authentication is disabled)

elements.label: Enable SSL/TLS
elements.tooltip: Enable SSL/TLS encryption for the Cassandra connection. When checked, the fields below take effect.

elements.label: Truststore Path
elements.tooltip: Path to a JKS or PKCS12 truststore used to verify the Cassandra server certificate. Leave blank to use the JVM default trust store (suitable for certs signed by well-known CAs).

elements.label: Truststore Password
elements.tooltip: Password for the truststore file. Leave blank if the truststore has no password.

elements.label: Truststore Type
elements.tooltip: Truststore file format: JKS or PKCS12. Default: JKS.

elements.label: mTLS Keystore Path
elements.tooltip: Path to a JKS or PKCS12 keystore containing the client certificate and private key for mutual TLS (mTLS). Leave blank for one-way TLS (no client certificate).

elements.label: mTLS Keystore Password
elements.tooltip: Password for the mTLS keystore (also used as the key-entry password).

elements.label: mTLS Keystore Type
elements.tooltip: Keystore file format: JKS or PKCS12. Default: JKS.

elements.label: TLS Hostname Verification
elements.tooltip: Verify that the Cassandra node's hostname matches the certificate CN/SAN. Disable only for self-signed certs in dev/test environments.

elements.label: Read Timeout (ms)
elements.tooltip: CQL request timeout in milliseconds (default 30000)

elements.label: Fetch Size (rows per page)
elements.tooltip: Number of rows fetched per CQL page. Tune for memory vs. round-trips (default 1000)

elements.label: Excluded Keyspaces
elements.tooltip: Comma-separated list of keyspaces to hide from Dremio (system keyspaces are always excluded)

elements.label: Consistency Level
elements.tooltip: Cassandra consistency level for read requests (e.g. LOCAL_ONE, LOCAL_QUORUM, QUORUM). Default: LOCAL_ONE

elements.label: Split Parallelism
elements.tooltip: Number of parallel token-range splits for reading a table. Higher values increase parallelism (default 8)

elements.label: Metadata Cache TTL (seconds)
elements.tooltip: How long to cache Cassandra schema metadata locally before refreshing. Default: 60 seconds

elements.label: Enable Speculative Execution
elements.tooltip: Enable speculative execution to retry slow queries on another node before the first completes

elements.label: Speculative Execution Delay (ms)
elements.tooltip: Delay in milliseconds before a speculative retry is sent. Only used when speculative execution is enabled (default 500)

elements.label: Protocol Compression
elements.tooltip: CQL wire-protocol compression: NONE (default), LZ4, or SNAPPY. Reduces network bandwidth at the cost of CPU. Recommended for WAN or cross-AZ deployments; leave NONE on fast local networks.

elements.label: Async Page Prefetch
elements.tooltip: Prefetch the next CQL page asynchronously while writing the current page into Arrow vectors. Overlaps network I/O with CPU work for large scans. Disable only for debugging. Default: enabled.
